stemHtml: Unaccompanied baggage to be carried by air shall be cleared under the procedures applicable for…

options.a: cargo but the requested customs clearance documents provided by airlines shall be completed by the passenger prior to shipment.
options.b: cargo but shall be not subject to any kind of declaration forms.
options.c: accompanied baggage, or under another simplified customs procedure distinct from that normally applied to cargo.
options.d: cargo when covered by a traffic document.
